projectContext: This is the Open WebUI Bridge companion app for the Meta Wearables Device Access Toolkit (Android). It demonstrates camera streaming, photo capture, MockDeviceKit testing, and sending text or captured images to Open WebUI. Open WebUI API context lives in docs/openwebui/index.md and docs/openwebui/openapi.snapshot.json; live Swagger docs require OWUI_BASE_URL with Open WebUI running in ENV=dev.
